response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls significantly short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar. The role requires 15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory capability; the resume shows ~13 years of primarily IC product work, no advanced degree, no evidence of cloud/AI platform leadership, customer advisory experience, or recognized AI thought leadership.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing through public talks, workshops, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Experience level (~13 yrs, senior/staff IC) is below the 15-year Principal/Director-level IC bar required
No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, recognized AI expertise, or shipped AI products at strategic scale
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving cloud platform strategy at an enterprise level

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Lacks recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
